description:
## Goal

Build the accesstoinsight.org downloader for Pali Canon texts.

## Responsibilities

- Handle accesstoinsight.org HTML structure
- Extract main content
- Handle multi-page texts
- Extract translator metadata

## Output

- raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.txt — clean plaintext
- raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.meta.toml — provenance metadata

## Implementation Details

- accesstoinsight.org uses specific HTML structure
- May have multi-page texts
- Need to handle footer notes and disclaimers

## See Also

docs/guru-implementation.md Stage 1: Corpus Acquisition
